name: Select
text:
Hello!

Sorry for interrupting your game, but you need to make a decision from Civ VII Wonders to work
UnCiv and Civ VII both share some wonders, with most of them having very different, and unbalanced, abilities.
There is also fewer wonders that are available later in the game in Civ VII compared to UnCiv
Here, you can select which wonders you wish to have in your game.

choices.text: Only Wonders unique to Civ VII (Recommended)
uniques: Comment [All wonders from UnCiv and wonders unique to Civ VII will be available]
Comment [All wonders from Civ VII and wonders unique to UnCiv will be available]
